name: Lato
description: The Lato is a highly accurate pistol used by the Tenno everywhere.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Lato is a highly accurate pistol used by the Tenno everywhere.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Codex entries for the MK-1 weapons, Braton Vandal and Lato Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Updated icons for the Lato and Braton Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: The Braton Prime, Braton Vandal, Aklato, Lato Prime, and Lato Vandal have all had their firing sounds remastered!

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.changes: Improved volume of the new firing sounds introduced in Update 19.10.0 in different environments for the Braton, Braton MK1, Lato, and Paris.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.11.0+19.11.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Further minor firing sound improvement tweaks to the Braton, Lato and Paris.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Optimized remastered Braton, Lato and Paris firing sounds for lower frame rates.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 1
patchlogs.changes: Slightly increased the damage of Lato Vandal in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lato Vandal Halloween Skin from appearing in the Market on its own.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Lato series damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Gammacor appearing in the codex as a duplicate ‘Lato’ entry.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Added custom recoil animations for Latron Prime, and Lato.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Lato Vandal, Latron Prime, Lato Prime, Snipetron Vandal, Sobek updated fire sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.2: Tenno Reinforcement
patchlogs.changes: Lato now has queued fire, and is set up like other semi-auto weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!

patchlogs.name: Update 7.x Weapon Balance Notes
patchlogs.fixes: Tweaks to Recoil and Accuracy make it more in line with recent changes to base Lato model. Added force feedback to its firing sound.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.5 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Lato Mods are now Compatible with Lato Prime.
